title: Commission Evidence Review
description: Gather and analyse existing research, data, and evidence to inform decision-making.

title: Hold Stakeholder Workshop
description: Bring together key stakeholders for collaborative planning and input gathering.

title: Draft Policy Brief
description: Write a concise policy document outlining the issue, options, and recommendations.

title: Engage Community Groups
description: Reach out to local community organisations to understand needs and build support.

title: Conduct Environmental Impact Assessment
description: Evaluate the potential environmental consequences of proposed actions or policies.

title: Secure Funding Approval
description: Prepare and submit a business case to secure the necessary budget and resources.

title: Establish Working Group
description: Form a cross-organisational team with clear terms of reference and membership.

title: Run Public Consultation
description: Design and deliver a formal public consultation to gather citizen views and feedback.

title: Develop Implementation Plan
description: Create a detailed plan with milestones, responsibilities, and timescales.

title: Commission Pilot Programme
description: Design and launch a small-scale trial to test the approach before wider rollout.

title: Build Partnership Agreement
description: Formalise collaboration with partner organisations through a shared agreement.

title: Conduct Training Programme
description: Deliver training to upskill staff and partners in the required capabilities.

title: Review Legislative Framework
description: Analyse the relevant legislation and regulatory requirements that apply.

title: Set Up Monitoring Framework
description: Design metrics, indicators, and reporting mechanisms to track progress.

title: Produce Communications Strategy
description: Plan how to inform, engage, and update the public and stakeholders throughout.

title: Carry Out Risk Assessment
description: Identify, analyse, and plan mitigations for key risks to delivery.

title: Align With Well-being Objectives
description: Map proposed actions against the Well-being of Future Generations Act goals.

title: Conduct Equality Impact Assessment
description: Assess how proposals affect different groups and ensure equity considerations.

title: Submit Report to Board
description: Present findings and recommendations to the governing board for approval.

title: Scale Up Delivery
description: Expand the programme or service from pilot to full-scale operation.

title: Budget Cuts Announced
description: A significant reduction in available funding requires you to reprioritise and scale back plans.

title: Key Staff Member Leaves
description: A critical person driving the work moves on. Knowledge and momentum are at risk.

title: Election Changes Priorities
description: A change in political leadership shifts the policy agenda. Your project may lose or gain support.

title: Public Opposition Emerges
description: Community groups or media raise strong objections to the proposed approach.

title: New Legislation Introduced
description: A new law or regulation changes the rules. You must adapt your plans to comply.

title: Partner Organisation Withdraws
description: A key partner pulls out of the collaboration, leaving a gap in resources or expertise.

title: Extreme Weather Event
description: A flood, storm, or heatwave disrupts services and diverts resources to emergency response.

title: Data Breach or Cyber Incident
description: A security incident compromises data and public trust. Recovery becomes a priority.

title: Demand Surge
description: An unexpected spike in demand for the service overwhelms current capacity.

title: Media Scrutiny
description: Negative media coverage puts the project under intense public and political pressure.

title: Supply Chain Disruption
description: Materials, technology, or services you depend on become unavailable or delayed.

title: Pandemic or Public Health Emergency
description: A health crisis redirects all attention and resources to immediate public health response.

title: Improved Public Trust
description: Transparent and effective action strengthens community confidence in your organisation.

title: Cross-departmental Collaboration
description: The work breaks down silos and fosters collaboration across teams and organisations.

title: Policy Cited in National Guidance
description: Your approach is recognised as best practice and referenced in national-level documents.

title: Staff Morale Boost
description: Seeing tangible progress and impact re-energises and motivates the team.

title: Unintended Negative Consequence
description: An action produces an unforeseen harmful side effect that needs addressing.

title: Increased Community Engagement
description: Local people become more involved and invested in public decision-making.

title: Cost Savings Realised
description: Efficiencies from the work generate savings that can be reinvested elsewhere.

title: Knowledge Spillover
description: Lessons learned transfer to other projects, teams, or organisations.

title: Environmental Co-benefits
description: Actions deliver additional environmental gains beyond the original objective.

title: Political Capital Gained
description: Successful delivery builds political support for further ambitious action.

title: Capacity Strain
description: The demands of delivery stretch organisational capacity and create fatigue.

title: New Partnership Opportunity
description: The work attracts interest from a new organisation wanting to collaborate.
